title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 192.740 - No liability for furnishing required information, exception
text:
192.740.  No liability for furnishing required information, exception. — No individual or organization providing information to the department in accordance with sections 192.735 to 192.744 shall be held liable in a civil or criminal action for divulging confidential information unless such individual or organization acted in bad faith or with malicious purpose.
(L. 1986 H.B. 1243 § 4)
